description_long: This zucchini is a medium-sized, cylindrical vegetable with a slightly curved shape and a tapered end. Its skin is mottled with various shades of green, ranging from pale to dark, and features a speckled pattern with some faint streaks and small, irregular spots. The surface appears matte with a subtle, natural sheen and a slightly rough, textured feel typical of fresh zucchini. The top end is rounded and slightly broader, while the bottom end is more tapered and blunt. There are no visible cuts, stickers, or artificial markings, only natural blemishes and color variations. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, unprocessed zucchini suitable for culinary use.
description: A medium-sized, slightly curved zucchini with mottled green skin and a natural, textured surface. The vegetable shows subtle color variations and natural blemishes.
description_view_0: The zucchini is seen from a three-quarter angle, highlighting its curved shape and the transition from lighter to darker green along its length.
description_view_1: This view shows the zucchini from the front, emphasizing its cylindrical form and the even distribution of green shades along the surface.
description_view_2: The zucchini is viewed from the opposite three-quarter angle, revealing more of the lighter green side and the gentle curve of the body.
description_view_3: A rear view of the zucchini, displaying the darker green side and the subtle speckling and natural surface texture.
attribute_orientation: standing upright with the broader end at the top and the tapered end at the bottom
